seoTitle: Balgownie vs Balickera — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Balgownie and Balickera. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Balgownie and Balickera.
heading: Balgownie vs Balickera — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balgownie, New South Wales and Balickera, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Balgownie has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Balickera (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balgownie or Balickera safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balgownie has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Balickera scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balgownie scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Balickera scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balgownie or Balickera?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Balgownie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
